description_long: This kiosk is a freestanding retail display unit with a rectangular vertical structure and three open shelves. The front features a large printed advertisement with a model and product images, as well as a header sign reading 'GET NAKED NATURALLY'. The shelves are stocked with various bottles and boxes, organized by color and type, suggesting a focus on personal care or beauty products. The sides are solid and black, while the shelving and display surfaces are white, creating a clean, modern contrast. The top section includes a raised platform for featured products and additional signage. The overall design is compact, functional, and visually appealing for use in urban commercial environments such as sidewalks, malls, or parks.
description: A modern, freestanding retail kiosk with three open shelves, bold signage, and organized product displays, primarily in black and white with colorful product accents.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a solid black panel with no visible shelving or signage.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the shelves, the arrangement of products, and the raised top display area.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the main advertisement, product organization on three shelves, and the prominent header sign.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing shelf depth, product arrangement, and the side profile of the signage.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the upper front structure, featuring a model, product images, and the text 'GET NAKED NATURALLY'.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with a raised display platform, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial display with minimalist influences.
